---
name: "TH2 E2 — Hygiene Suggestions"
about: "Implement TH2.E2 Hygiene Suggestions"
labels: [epic, TH2, E2]
assignees: [copilot]
---

- [ ] US1 — Detect orphan and duplicate-near-identical hygiene candidates: identify cleanup candidates without mutating the graph.
- [ ] US2 — Detect contradictory facts and propose resolution candidates: surface conflicting facts together with proposed resolution paths.
- [ ] US3 — Return machine-readable hygiene suggestion plans: emit suggest-only plans that downstream agents can review programmatically.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH2-graph-hygiene-and-stats/epics/E2-hygiene-suggestions/stories/`
